Interface IImageCollection

Represents a collection that stores images and allows them to be retrieved using unique keys.

The IImageCollection interface is implemented by the UI library and is not intended to be implemented by consumer code.

Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public interface IImageCollection
Remarks

This collection is used by ITree to resolve images associated with nodes. Images are registered in the collection using a unique key and can later be referenced by that key (for example, through ImageKey or ExpandedImageKey).

Using a centralized image collection allows multiple nodes to reuse the same image without duplicating resources.

Methods

AddImage(string, Image)

Adds an image to the collection using the specified key.

Declaration
int AddImage(string imageKey, Image image)
Parameters
Type Name Description
string imageKey

The unique key used to identify the image.
Image image

The Image instance to add.
Returns
Type Description
int

The index of the added image within the collection.
Remarks

The imageKey must be unique within the collection. Once added, the image can be referenced using this key.

Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentException

Thrown if imageKey is empty or contains whitespace.
ArgumentNullException

Thrown if imageKey or image is null.
InvalidOperationException

Thrown if an image with the same key already exists in the collection.

Contains(string)

Determines whether an image with the specified key exists in the collection.

Declaration
bool Contains(string imageKey)
Parameters
Type Name Description
string imageKey

The key associated with the image.
Returns
Type Description
bool

true if the collection contains an image with the specified key; otherwise, false.
Remarks

Use this method to check whether an image has already been registered in the collection before attempting to add or reference it.
